function.arguments: {"requirements": [{"title": "Sub function returns difference of two integers", "description": "pkg/math.Sub(a, b int) int returns a - b. Mirror Add's exported-function shape: live in pkg/math/sub.go, package math, package comment on the file, function-level GoDoc. A unit test in pkg/math/sub_test.go must call Sub with at least one positive case and assert the result, mirroring TestAdd's table-free shape.", "depends_on": []}]}
